description: Pins the client_id-positive rejection, the 3-32/charset label rejection now enforced in both languages (Python gained Go's check + message), and the update PUT. The label case sets confirm:true so both reach the label check.

cases.name: rejects non-positive client_id
cases.expect_error: client_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: rejects an invalid label
cases.expect_error: label must be 3-32 characters and contain only letters, digits, hyphen, or underscore

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates a Longview client. Set confirm=true to proceed.
